title: Enterprise Architect (JD#10809)
description:
Job Summary

An opportunity for an Enterprise Architect to provide overall governance that ensures efficient, consistent and compliance execution of technology solutions. 

Ideal candidate should have technical knowledge and skills in system architecture and solutioning, technology deployment and operations to ensure technology platforms and solutions adhere to architecture standards for new initiatives as well as ongoing changes.

Mandatory Skill-set

  • Degree in Information Technology, Computer Engineering, Computer Science or Information System;
  • Must have minimum 12 years of design and implementation experience in Enterprise Architecture Governance, Solution Architect, Distributed Applications, and Service Oriented Architectures ( SOA ) Frameworks;
  • Must have experience in designing, developing and deploying large, scalable production applications on Cloud / PaaS platforms and Containers (such as AWS, Google and Azure);
  • Deep understanding of technology stack including Enterprise Java and Spring Boot, front-end technologies and framework (such as ReactJS), mobile application development, middleware and integration technologies;
  • Experience in overall governance of IT solutions, framework, policies, processes, and rules that ensure effective, consistent, and compliant execution of technology solutions;
  • Proficient in conceptualizing and deriving common architectural designs across multiple services;
  • Highly conversant in architectural concepts, principles and SOA governance practice;
  • Solid Agile development experience and has experience architecting large enterprise-wide systems;
  • Strong stakeholder management skills with the ability to communicate architecture methods, concepts, standards and policies;
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, and able to work well with cross-organizational teams.

Desired Skill-set

  • Certified in TOGAF / ITIL / COBIT / CISA;
  • Experience in Financial / Insurance Industry and relevant regulatory requirements, such as MAS TRM Guidelines.

Responsibilities

  • Lead enterprise-wide solution architecture for organization's digital transformation journey, to set the direction and deliver the Enterprise Architecture (EA) future state;
  • Conceptualize, Architect, Design Digital Solutions & Research on current state, identify the gaps and map out the to-be state and roadmap;
  • Provide guidance in establishing architecture policies, standards, processes and platform to drive scalability and proposed changes where required;
  • Developing and communicating guiding principles, governance structures related to the selection of architectural components;
  • Ensure technology platforms and solutions adhere to architecture standards for new initiatives and ongoing changes;
  • Overall architecture governance, including but not limited to security, quality, compliance and data;
  • Ensure regular administration of architecture review including facilitation of resolution of feedback, tracking and follow up for effective closure of design gap;
  • Ensuring consistency in design, principles are maintained and supported;
  • Provide direction and advise on organization-wide technology changes in the development of enterprise business architecture vision and related IT solutions;
  • Partner with business, product and technology team in the delivery of solutions and results through technology enhancements, development and implementation;
  • Guide application operations, propose new solution methodologies and mentor the team raising the collective technical competencies;
  • Ensure collaboration to maintain up-to-date architecture and solution artefacts as well as communication materials for stakeholders, technology forums, and community engagements. 

Should you be interested in this career opportunity, please send in your updated resume to apply@sciente.com at the earliest.

When you apply, you voluntarily consent to the disclosure, collection and use of your personal data for employment/recruitment and related purposes in accordance with the SCIENTE Group Privacy Policy, a copy of which is published at SCIENTE’s website (https://www.sciente.com/privacy-policy).

Confidentiality is assured, and only shortlisted candidates will be notified for interviews.

EA Licence No. 07C5639

postedCompany.description:
As a trusted business technology parther in intelligent transformation & technology talent services, our value-added services are in the following areas:
- AI-led Intelligentisation,
- Data Engineering and Intelligence,
- Insurance & Financial services focused Business Technology Consulting and
- Various technology talent management/recruitment solutions.


Sciente International Pte Ltd, a member of SCIENTE, is an ISO9001:2015, Data Protection Trustmark (by IMDA) and Great Place to Work Certified, multi-award winning, specialist Business Technology Consulting partner for our clients in intelligent transformation and technology talent managemnent services, across the industries and government sector.


At Sciente International, we orchestrate a symphony of innovation, expertise, and growth.  We like to help redefine what’s possible when Technology, Talent, and Transformation converge. 


With 17+ years of experience delighting clients by combining technology, talent and transformation, we have an excellent track record. We believe our credentials can make you comfortable with us:

  • Laser-like focus on Data & AI, talent and transformation: we seek strong partnerships with our clients, and they rely on us for IT modernization & intelligentisation
  • Technology and industry specialization: we accurately understand clients’ needs because of our practices and specialization. Clients trust and prefer to work with us exclusively. Most of our business is from existing clients.
  • Multi-award-winning, ISO 9001:2015 and Data Protection Trustmark certified: mature, proven processes and methodologies to consistently deliver high-quality IT services. You can rely on us to deliver on promises.
  • Strong leadership team which provides direction, clarity, professionalism and motivation: We are led by a strong leadership team with decades of work experience within IT industry and with good hearts.
  • Values matter most: our honest, ethical and transparent Consultants provide expert, consultative advice for informed career decisions
  • “Our mission – Delighted clients & community”: Sciente organization is a hybrid organization, in which profit-making businesses sponsor the social innovations, community services & nature sustainability efforts. Besides, we assist clients while providing our Consultants careers with meaning. This approach lets our Consultants go the extra mile.

The organization affirms the importance of giving back to the community.  


Since its inception, Sciente group has won over 40 awards, including the HR Champion Award (SME & Start-up category) in 2023 by SHRI, Peak Tech Laureates 2020 Award under Human Capital Management category (2020) and various awards for Corporate Social Responsibility, with continued revenue growth. Sciente group of companies maintain a firm presence in Singapore (HQ), Malaysia, India and USA market, with a considerable track record of service delivery success stories.

To know more, please visit - https://www.sciente.com
